186→        postStatus: PostStatus,
187→        formattedDate: String,
188→        displayName: String?,
189→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
190→        isSearch: Boolean
191→    ): List<UiString> {
192→        val uiStrings: MutableList<UiString> = mutableListOf()
193→
194→        if (!formattedDate.isBlank()) {
195→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(formattedDate))
196→        }
197→        if (authorFilterSelection == EVERYONE && !displayName.isNullOrBlank()) {
198→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(displayName))
199→        }
200→
201→        if (isSearch) {
202→            val postStatusText = when (postStatus) {
203→                UNKNOWN -> R.string.unknown
204→                PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_status_post_published
205→                DRAFT -> R.string.post_status_draft
206→                PRIVATE -> R.string.post_status_post_private
207→                PENDING -> R.string.post_status_pending_review
208→                TRASHED -> R.string.post_status_post_trashed
209→                SCHEDULED -> R.string.post_status_post_scheduled
210→            }
211→            uiStrings.add(UiStringRes(postStatusText))
212→        }
213→        return uiStrings
214→    }
215→
216→    private fun getTitle(post: PostModel): UiString {
217→        return if (post.title.isNotBlank()) {
218→            UiStringText(StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(post.title).let { HtmlUtils.stripHtml(it) })
219→        } else UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)
220→    }
221→
222→    private fun getExcerpt(post: PostModel): UiString? =
223→        PostUtils.getPostListExcerptFromPost(post)
224→            .takeIf { !it.isNullOrBlank() }
225→            ?.let { StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(it) }
226→            ?.let { PostUtils.collapseShortcodes(it) }
227→            ?.let { UiStringText(it) }
228→
229→    private fun getProgressBarState(
230→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
231→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean
232→    ): ProgressBarUiState {
233→        return if (shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState, performingCriticalAction)) {
234→            if (uploadUiState is UploadingMedia) {
235→                ProgressBarUiState.Determinate(uploadUiState.progress)
236→            } else {
237→                ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate
238→            }
239→        } else {
240→            ProgressBarUiState.Hidden
241→        }
242→    }
243→
244→    private fun shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
245→        return performingCriticalAction || uploadUiState is UploadingPost || uploadUiState is UploadingMedia ||
246→                uploadUiState is UploadQueued
247→    }
248→
249→    private fun getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
250→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
251→        postStatus: PostStatus,
252→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
253→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
254→    ): MutableList<UiString> {
255→        val labels: MutableList<UiString> = ArrayList()
256→        when {
257→            uploadUiState is UploadFailed -> {
258→                getErrorLabel(uploadUiState, postStatus)?.let { labels.add(it) }
259→            }
260→
261→            uploadUiState is UploadingPost -> if (uploadUiState.isDraft) {
262→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading_draft))
263→            } else {
264→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading))
265→            }
266→
267→            uploadUiState is UploadingMedia -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.uploading_media))
268→            uploadUiState is UploadQueued -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_queued))
269→            uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection -> {
270→                getWaitingForConnectionStatus(uploadUiState.postStatus)?.let {
271→                    labels.add(it)
272→                }
273→            }
274→
275→            hasUnhandledConflicts -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_is_conflicted))
276→            hasAutoSave -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_autosave_revision_available))
277→        }
278→        return labels
279→    }
280→
281→    private fun getWaitingForConnectionStatus(postStatus: PostStatus): UiString? {
282→        return when (postStatus) {
283→            UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_publish))
284→            PRIVATE -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_private))
285→            PENDING -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_pending))
286→            SCHEDULED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_scheduled))
287→            DRAFT -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_draft))
288→            TRASHED -> {
289→                AppLog.e(
290→                    POSTS,
291→                    "Developer error: This state shouldn't happen. Trashed post is in " +
292→                            "UploadWaitingForConnection state."
293→                )
294→                return null
295→            }
296→        }
297→    }
298→
299→    private fun getStatuses(
300→        postStatus: PostStatus,
301→        post: PostModel,
302→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
303→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
304→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
305→    ): List<UiString> {
306→        val labels = getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
307→            uploadUiState,
308→            postStatus,
309→            hasUnhandledConflicts,
310→            hasAutoSave
311→        )
312→
313→        // we want to show either single error/progress label or 0-n info labels.
314→        if (labels.isEmpty()) {
315→            if (post.isLocalDraft) {
316→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_draft))
317→            } else if (post.isLocallyChanged) {
318→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_changes))
319→            }
320→            if (postStatus == PRIVATE) {
321→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_post_private))
322→            }
323→            if (postStatus == PENDING) {
324→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_pending_review))
325→            }
326→            if (post.sticky) {
327→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_sticky))
328→            }
329→        }
330→        return labels
331→    }
332→
333→    private fun getErrorLabel(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiString? {
334→        return when {
335→            uploadUiState.error.mediaError != null -> getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState, postStatus)
336→            uploadUiState.error.postError != null -> UploadUtils.getErrorMessageResIdFromPostError(
337→                postStatus,
338→                false,
339→                uploadUiState.error.postError,
340→                uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload
341→            )
342→
343→            else -> {
344→                val errorMsg = "MediaError and postError are both null."
345→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
346→                    throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)
347→                } else {
348→                    AppLog.e(POSTS, errorMsg)
349→                }
350→                UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic)
351→            }
352→        }
353→    }
354→
355→    private fun getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiStringRes {
356→        return when {
357→            uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload -> when (postStatus) {
358→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying)
359→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying_private)
360→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled_retrying)
361→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted_retrying)
362→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic_error_retrying)
363→            }
364→
365→            uploadUiState.retryWillPushChanges -> when (postStatus) {
366→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published)
367→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_private)
368→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled)
369→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted)
370→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
371→            }
372→
373→            else -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
374→        }
375→    }
376→
377→    private fun shouldShowOverlay(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
378→        // show overlay when post upload is in progress or (media upload is in progress and the user is not using Aztec)
379→        return performingCriticalAction ||
380→                (uploadUiState is UploadingPost ||
381→                        (!appPrefsWrapper.isAztecEditorEnabled && uploadUiState is UploadingMedia))
382→    }
383→
384→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "ComplexMethod")
385→    private fun createButtonTypes(
386→        postStatus: PostStatus,
387→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
388→        isLocallyChanged: Boolean,
389→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
390→        siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
391→        statsSupported: Boolean,
392→        shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase: Boolean,
393→        shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze: Boolean
394→    ): List<PostListButtonType> {
395→        val canRetryUpload = uploadUiState is UploadFailed
396→        val canCancelPendingAutoUpload = (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
397→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
398→        val canPublishPost = (canRetryUpload || uploadUiState is NothingToUpload || !canCancelPendingAutoUpload) &&
399→                (isLocallyChanged || isLocalDraft || postStatus == DRAFT ||
400→                        (siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish && postStatus == PENDING))
401→
402→        val canShowStats = statsSupported &&
403→                postStatus == PUBLISHED &&
404→                !isLocalDraft &&
405→                !isLocallyChanged &&
406→                shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase
407→        val canShowCopy = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == DRAFT
408→        val canShowCopyUrlButton = !isLocalDraft && postStatus != TRASHED
409→        val canShowViewButton = !canRetryUpload && postStatus != TRASHED
410→        val canShowPublishButton = canRetryUpload || canPublishPost
411→        val buttonTypes = ArrayList<PostListButtonType>()
412→
413→        if (postStatus != TRASHED) {
414→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_EDIT)
415→        }
416→
417→        if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload) {
418→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD)
419→        }
420→
421→        if (canShowPublishButton) {
422→            buttonTypes.add(
423→                when {
424→                    canRetryUpload -> BUTTON_RETRY
425→                    !siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish -> BUTTON_SUBMIT
426→                    postStatus == SCHEDULED && isLocallyChanged -> BUTTON_SYNC
427→                    else -> BUTTON_PUBLISH
428→                }
429→            )
430→        }
431→
432→        if (canShowViewButton) {
433→            buttonTypes.addViewOrPreviewAction(isLocalDraft || isLocallyChanged)
434→        }
435→
436→        if (canShowStats) {
437→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_STATS)
438→        }
439→
440→        if (canShowCopy) {
441→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY)
442→        }
443→
444→        buttonTypes.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus)
445→
446→        if (canShowCopyUrlButton) {
447→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY_URL)
448→        }
449→
450→        if (shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze) {
451→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
452→        }
453→
454→        buttonTypes.addDeletingOrTrashAction(isLocalDraft, postStatus)
455→
456→        return buttonTypes
457→    }
458→
459→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addViewOrPreviewAction(shouldShowPreview: Boolean) {
460→        add(if (shouldShowPreview) BUTTON_PREVIEW else BUTTON_VIEW)
461→    }
462→
463→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addDeletingOrTrashAction(
464→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
465→        postStatus: PostStatus
466→    ) {
467→        when {
468→            isLocalDraft -> add(BUTTON_DELETE)
469→            postStatus == TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY)
470→            postStatus != TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_TRASH)
471→        }
472→    }
473→
474→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus: PostStatus) {
475→        val canMovePostToDraft = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == TRASHED
476→
477→        if (canMovePostToDraft) {
478→            add(BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
479→        }
480→    }
481→
482→    private fun createDefaultViewActions(
483→        buttonTypes: List<PostListButtonType>,
484→        onButtonClicked: (PostListButtonType) -> Unit
485→    ): List<PostListItemAction> {
486→        val createSinglePostListItem = { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
487→            PostListItemAction.SingleItem(buttonType, onButtonClicked)
488→        }
489→        return if (buttonTypes.size > MAX_NUMBER_OF_VISIBLE_ACTIONS_STANDARD) {
490→            val visibleItems = buttonTypes.take(MAX_NUMBER_OF_VISIBLE_ACTIONS_STANDARD - 1)
491→                .map(createSinglePostListItem)
492→            val itemsUnderMore = buttonTypes.subList(
493→                kotlin.math.max(MAX_NUMBER_OF_VISIBLE_ACTIONS_STANDARD - 1, 0),
494→                buttonTypes.size
495→            )
496→                .map(createSinglePostListItem)
497→
498→            visibleItems.plus(PostListItemAction.MoreItem(itemsUnderMore, onButtonClicked))
499→        } else {
500→            buttonTypes.map(createSinglePostListItem)
501→        }
502→    }
503→
504→    private fun createCompactViewActions(
505→        buttonTypes: List<PostListButtonType>,
506→        onButtonClicked: (PostListButtonType) -> Unit
507→    ): PostListItemAction.MoreItem {
508→        val allItems = buttonTypes.map { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
509→            PostListItemAction.SingleItem(buttonType, onButtonClicked)
510→        }
511→        return PostListItemAction.MoreItem(allItems, onButtonClicked)
512→    }
513→}

1109→    private fun createPostModel(
1110→        status: String = POST_STATE_PUBLISH,
1111→        isLocalDraft: Boolean = false,
1112→        isLocallyChanged: Boolean = false,
1113→        authorDisplayName: String? = null,
1114→        sticky: Boolean = false
1115→    ): PostModel {
1116→        val post = PostModel()
1117→        post.setStatus(status)
1118→        post.setIsLocalDraft(isLocalDraft)
1119→        post.setIsLocallyChanged(isLocallyChanged)
1120→        post.setAuthorDisplayName(authorDisplayName)
1121→        post.setSticky(sticky)
1122→        return post
1123→    }
1124→
1125→    private fun createPostListItemUiState(
1126→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection = AuthorFilterSelection.EVERYONE,
1127→        post: PostModel = PostModel(),
1128→        site: SiteModel = SiteModel(),
1129→        unhandledConflicts: Boolean = false,
1130→        hasAutoSave: Boolean = false,
1131→        capabilitiesToPublish: Boolean = true,
1132→        statsSupported: Boolean = true,
1133→        featuredImageUrl: String? = null,
1134→        formattedDate: String = FORMATTER_DATE,
